params.name: Fake Jaden's Head
params.description: This majestic dragon head came from a monster named Yazi. As the Dragon God's double, it cultivated years to obtain the ability to summon the Dragon God's projection and spent a lot of money on plastic surgery to look the same as the Dragon God!
